CommunityApplications.Profile:
GarageStack is an open-source vehicle monitoring dashboard for MG / SAIC electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles. It connects to the MG iSmart cloud and stores all data locally in a single container -- no external database or MQTT broker required.
Features: live dashboard, charging and efficiency statistics, trip history with heatmap visualisation, and Web Push notifications.
Support: https://github.com/joszz/garagestack/issues
